description: Style NoteCrafted from soft polyester fabric, this pair of shorts from nike offers exemplary dry comfort, making it a great everyday choice for your healthy runs and casual days. Team this tee with a colourful tee and running shoes for a sporty look. Add on a hooded sweatshirt for exemplary comfort during winters.Product DetailsBlack shorts with orange paneling at the sides, has a drawstring at the inner waist, elastication at he waist and engineered with Dri-Fit technologyMaterial and Care100% polyesterMachine wash coldWash inside out with like coloursRemove immediatelyDo not bleach Tumble dry lowDo not dry clean
